item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p06","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant immediately refuses adding a fridge-side confirmer, recognizes the repeated pattern of using downstream manual guards/checkers to patch process holes, and redirects to owner/rule/data-field fixes plus exception escalation.
